scripts.dev: concurrently -n PYTHON_API,NGROK,CLOUDFLARE,NODE_API "cd \"Backend(Python)\" && python -m uvicorn app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload" "ngrok http --url=https://namely-finer-seasnail.ngrok-free.app 8000" "cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:5000" "cd \"Backend(Node)\" && npm run dev"
